description: CompositionBlack kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a slit neck, three-quarter sleeves, sequin work along the neckline, horizontal pin tucks and colourful stitch detailing on the torso and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeMedium to hot ironClassic patterning on contemporary styles by biba is inspired by traditional Indian print and dye arts that make it a special wardrobe favourite. Timelessly chic, this piece will never go out of style. Wear it with tonal leggings and pumps for ethnic glam or with form fitting denims and flats for a casual do.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
